response:
CANDIDATE_PARTIAL: CapitalOf(santiago, chile)
CANDIDATE_OVERWEAK: (CapitalOf(santiago, chile) | LargestCityOf(santiago, chile))
CANDIDATE_OVERSTRONG: (CapitalOf(santiago, chile) & LargestCityOf(santiago, chile) & CapitalOf(chile, santiago))
CANDIDATE_GIBBERISH: (LargestCityOf(chile, santiago) & CapitalOf(chile, santiago))
